notes: Hooks never cut off mid-action: fast movement inside one continuous shot no longer counts as a scene cut, so hooks run to the real content change and donate whole. Split sections start seamlessly - halves play at exact source scale with a clean seam bar instead of being stretched, so nothing pops bigger at the boundary. Plus the reaction-half mixing and live progress log from 2.9.13.
_urls: windows.url is the GitHub Release asset (stable, public, direct .exe) and sha256 pins the exact binary - the 2.9.8+ updater verifies the download against it before offering to install. mac stays EMPTY on purpose: the Mac build ships as a .zip, which the in-app updater does not run; Mac customers always get the newest build from app.lemonsqueezy.com/my-orders.
